---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in BLT
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happens.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11, macOS 14]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17]
- **BLT Version / Commit**: [e.g. main branch, commit SHA, or release tag]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (logs, related issues, etc.).
